metadata.significance: Condemns Abu Lahab and his wife for their opposition to Islam

ayahs.arabic: بِسْمِ ٱللَّهِ ٱلرَّحْمَـٰنِ ٱلرَّحِيمِ تَبَّتْ يَدَآ أَبِى لَهَبٍ وَتَبَّ

translations.en_sahih: May the hands of Abu Lahab be ruined, and ruined is he.
translations.en_yusufali: Perish the hands of the Father of Flame! Perish he!
translations.ms_basmeih: Binasalah kedua-dua tangan Abu lahab, dan binasalah ia bersama!

ayahs.arabic: مَآ أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُ مَالُهُۥ وَمَا كَسَبَ
ayahs.transliteration: Ma aghna AAanhu maluhu wama kasaba

translations.en_sahih: His wealth will not avail him or that which he gained.
translations.en_yusufali: No profit to him from all his wealth, and all his gains!
translations.ms_basmeih: Hartanya dan segala yang diusahakannya, tidak dapat menolongnya.

translations.en_sahih: He will [enter to] burn in a Fire of [blazing] flame
translations.en_yusufali: Burnt soon will he be in a Fire of Blazing Flame!
translations.ms_basmeih: Ia akan menderita bakaran api neraka yang marak menjulang.

translations.en_sahih: And his wife [as well] - the carrier of firewood.
translations.en_yusufali: His wife shall carry the (crackling) wood - As fuel!-
translations.ms_basmeih: Dan juga isterinya, seorang perempuan pemunggah kayu api. -

translations.en_sahih: Around her neck is a rope of [twisted] fiber.
translations.en_yusufali: A twisted rope of palm-leaf fibre round her (own) neck!
translations.ms_basmeih: Di lehernya sejenis tali, dari tali-tali yang dipintal.
